evals.prompt: I just finished adding a new login page with OAuth support. Can you create a PR for this branch?
evals.expected_output: PR with feat: prefix, Summary + Test plan body, PR URL returned.
expectations: PR title starts with 'feat:' since this is a new feature
PR title is under 70 characters
PR title uses lowercase description with no trailing period, imperative mood
PR body contains exactly two sections: '## Summary' and '## Test plan' — no extra sections
PR body '## Test plan' section uses checkbox format (- [ ])
Commands include 'git push -u origin' to push before creating PR
Runs 'which gh' to detect environment and uses the correct tool: gh CLI if available, mcp__github__create_pull_request MCP tool if not

evals.prompt: ok great, now open a PR for all that

expectations: Skips git diff, git log, and git status since the assistant already knows what changed from conversation context

PR title is under 70 characters

PR body contains exactly two sections: '## Summary' and '## Test plan' — no extra sections
PR body '## Test plan' section uses checkbox format (- [ ])

evals.expected_output: Even with minimal prompt, creates a proper PR by gathering git context. Correct type prefix, Summary + Test plan body.

PR title uses lowercase description with no trailing period, imperative mood
PR body contains exactly two sections: '## Summary' and '## Test plan' — no extra sections
PR body '## Test plan' section uses checkbox format (- [ ])

Runs 'which gh' to detect environment and uses the correct tool
